/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/commitly_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/titlebar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/sidebar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/changestab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/historytab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/diffviewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/commitdetailview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/mockdata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/commitly.dir/src/syncheader.cpp.o -o commitly  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
